content: I think it would be good to articulate the importance of some side stories, like gramona deepdive and sorel special ops, which are basically mandatory for understanding the arc 1 story. Arc 1 spoilers ahead. ||The fact that arc 1 ends with remembering everyone (people like faint, uvhash, liz - all of which you never encounter during normal main story playthrough, or ghelot and casiah too, who only appears once in chapter 7) is not bad, at least I don't think it's worth changing even if you could, but I do think it's worth suggesting the player to read the side stories, and that may include making them cheaper - you need a whole week to unlock one special ops, and that is if you are not already spending on Phonograph or Reproduction Frenzies or Psyche Deepdives||
